1: use std::ffi::{CStr, CString};
2: use std::sync::Arc;
3: use libc::{c_char, c_void};
4: use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};
5: use regex::Regex;
6: use std::collections::HashMap;
7: 
8: use ox_webservice_api::{
9:     CoreHostApi, FlowControl, UriMatcher,
10:     FLOW_CONTROL_CONTINUE, FLOW_CONTROL_SKIP,
11:     OX_LOG_ERROR, OX_LOG_DEBUG
12: };
13: 
14: #[derive(Serialize, Deserialize, Debug, Clone)]
15: pub struct RouterConfig {
16:     #[serde(default)]
17:     pub routes: Vec<RouterRouteEntry>
18: }
19: 
20: #[derive(Serialize, Deserialize, Debug, Clone)]
21: pub struct RouterRouteEntry {
22:     pub matcher: Option<UriMatcher>,
23:     pub module_id: String,
24:     pub priority: u16
25: }
26: 
27: pub struct RouterModule {
28:     #[allow(dead_code)]
29:     config: RouterConfig,
30:     compiled_routes: Vec<CompiledRoute>,
31: }
32: 
33: struct CompiledRoute {
34:     matcher_path_regex: Option<Regex>,
35:     matcher_header_regexes: HashMap<String, Regex>,
36:     matcher_query_regexes: HashMap<String, Regex>,
37:     module_id: String,
38:     module_id_cstring: CString,
39:     matcher_protocol: Option<String>,
40:     matcher_hostname_regex: Option<Regex>,
41:     matcher_status_code_regex: Option<Regex>,
42: }
43: 
44: impl RouterModule {
45:     pub fn new(config: RouterConfig) -> Result<Self, String> {
46:         let mut compiled_routes = Vec::new();
47: 
48:         for route in &config.routes {
49:             let mut path_regex = None;
50:             let mut header_regexes = HashMap::new();
51:             let mut query_regexes = HashMap::new();
52:             let mut matcher_hostname_regex = None;
53:             let mut matcher_status_code_regex = None;
54: 
55:             if let Some(matcher) = &route.matcher {
56:                 if !matcher.path.is_empty() {
57:                     path_regex = Some(Regex::new(&matcher.path).map_err(|e| format!("Invalid path regex '{}': {}", matcher.path, e))?);
58:                 }
59:                 
60:                 if let Some(host) = &matcher.hostname {
61:                     matcher_hostname_regex = Some(Regex::new(host).map_err(|e| format!("Invalid hostname regex '{}': {}", host, e))?);
62:                 }
63:                 if let Some(sc) = &matcher.status_code {
64:                      matcher_status_code_regex = Some(Regex::new(sc).map_err(|e| format!("Invalid status code regex '{}': {}", sc, e))?);
65:                 }
66: 
67:                 if let Some(headers) = &matcher.headers {
68:                     for (k, v) in headers {
69:                         let re = Regex::new(v).map_err(|e| format!("Invalid header regex for '{}': {}", k, e))?;
70:                         header_regexes.insert(k.clone(), re);
71:                     }
72:                 }
73: 
74:                 if let Some(query) = &matcher.query {
75:                     for (k, v) in query {
76:                         let re = Regex::new(v).map_err(|e| format!("Invalid query regex for '{}': {}", k, e))?;
77:                         query_regexes.insert(k.clone(), re);
78:                     }
79:                 }
80:             }
81: 
82:             compiled_routes.push(CompiledRoute {
83:                 matcher_path_regex: path_regex,
84:                 matcher_header_regexes: header_regexes,
85:                 matcher_query_regexes: query_regexes,
86:                 module_id_cstring: CString::new(route.module_id.clone()).unwrap_or_default(),
87:                 module_id: route.module_id.clone(),
88:                 matcher_protocol: route.matcher.as_ref().and_then(|m| m.protocol.clone()),
89:                 matcher_hostname_regex,
90:                 matcher_status_code_regex,
91:             });
92:         }
93: 
94:         Ok(RouterModule {
95:             config,
96:             compiled_routes,
97:         })
98:     }
99: }
100: 
101: pub struct ModuleContext {
102:     module: Arc<RouterModule>,
103:     api: CoreHostApi,
104:     _module_id: String,
105: }
106: 
107: // Helper to interact with CoreHostApi
108: fn get_field(api: &CoreHostApi, task_ctx: *mut c_void, key: &str) -> String {
109:     let c_key = CString::new(key).unwrap();
110:     let res_ptr = (api.get_field)(task_ctx, c_key.as_ptr());
111:     if res_ptr.is_null() {
112:         return String::new();
113:     }
114:     unsafe { CStr::from_ptr(res_ptr).to_string_lossy().into_owned() }
115: }
116: 
117: fn set_field(api: &CoreHostApi, task_ctx: *mut c_void, key: &str, value: &str) {
118:     let c_key = CString::new(key).unwrap();
119:     let c_val = CString::new(value).unwrap();
120:     (api.set_field)(task_ctx, c_key.as_ptr(), c_val.as_ptr());
121: }
122: 
123: #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
124: pub unsafe extern "C" fn ox_plugin_init(
125:     plugin_config_ctx: *const c_char,
126:     api_ptr: *const CoreHostApi,
127:     _abi_version: u32,
128: ) -> *mut c_void {
129:     if api_ptr.is_null() {
130:         return std::ptr::null_mut();
131:     }
132:     let api = unsafe { *api_ptr };
133: 
134:     let params_str = if !plugin_config_ctx.is_null() {
135:         unsafe { CStr::from_ptr(plugin_config_ctx).to_string_lossy().to_string() }
136:     } else {
137:         "{}".to_string()
138:     };
139:     
140:     let config: RouterConfig = serde_json::from_str(&params_str).unwrap_or(RouterConfig { routes: vec![] });
141:     
142:     let module = match RouterModule::new(config) {
143:         Ok(m) => Arc::new(m),
144:         Err(e) => {
145:              let msg = CString::new(format!("Failed to init router: {}", e)).unwrap();
146:              (api.log)(std::ptr::null_mut(), OX_LOG_ERROR, msg.as_ptr());
147:              return std::ptr::null_mut();
148:         }
149:     };
150: 
151:     let ctx = Box::new(ModuleContext {
152:         module,
153:         api,
154:         _module_id: "ox_webservice_router".to_string(),
155:     });
156: 
157:     Box::into_raw(ctx) as *mut c_void
158: }
159: 
160: #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
161: pub unsafe extern "C" fn ox_plugin_process(
162:     plugin_config_ctx: *mut c_void,
163:     task_ctx: *mut c_void,
164: ) -> FlowControl {
165:     if plugin_config_ctx.is_null() {
166:         return FlowControl { code: FLOW_CONTROL_CONTINUE, payload: std::ptr::null() };
167:     }
168:     let context = unsafe { &*(plugin_config_ctx as *mut ModuleContext) };
169:     let api = &context.api;
170: 
171:     let protocol = get_field(api, task_ctx, "request.protocol");
172:     let original_path = get_field(api, task_ctx, "request.path");
173: 
174:     for route in &context.module.compiled_routes {
175:         if let Some(proto) = &route.matcher_protocol {
176:             if !proto.eq_ignore_ascii_case(&protocol) && !protocol.is_empty() { continue; }
177:         }
178: 
179:         if let Some(re) = &route.matcher_hostname_regex {
180:             let host_val = get_field(api, task_ctx, "request.header.Host");
181:             if !re.is_match(&host_val) { continue; }
182:         }
183: 
184:         let mut path_match_capture = None;
185:         if let Some(re) = &route.matcher_path_regex {
186:             if let Some(caps) = re.captures(&original_path) {
187:                 if let Some(m) = caps.get(1) {
188:                     path_match_capture = Some(m.as_str().to_string());
189:                 }
190:             } else {
191:                 continue;
192:             }
193:         }
194: 
195:         let mut headers_match = true;
196:         for (key, re) in &route.matcher_header_regexes {
197:             let val = if key.eq_ignore_ascii_case("Method") {
198:                  get_field(api, task_ctx, "request.method")
199:             } else {
200:                 let lookup_key = format!("request.header.{}", key);
201:                 let mut v = get_field(api, task_ctx, &lookup_key);
202:                 if v.is_empty() {
203:                     let lower_key = format!("request.header.{}", key.to_lowercase());
204:                     v = get_field(api, task_ctx, &lower_key);
205:                 }
206:                 v
207:             };
208: 
209:             if !re.is_match(&val) {
210:                 headers_match = false;
211:                 break;
212:             }
213:         }
214:         if !headers_match { continue; }
215: 
216:         let mut query_match = true;
217:         for (key, re) in &route.matcher_query_regexes {
218:             let lookup_key = format!("request.query.{}", key);
219:             let mut val = get_field(api, task_ctx, &lookup_key);
220:             
221:             if val.is_empty() {
222:                 let query_str = get_field(api, task_ctx, "request.query");
223:                 let params: HashMap<String, String> = url::form_urlencoded::parse(query_str.as_bytes())
224:                     .into_owned()
225:                     .collect();
226:                 val = params.get(key).cloned().unwrap_or_default();
227:             }
228: 
229:             if !re.is_match(&val) {
230:                 query_match = false;
231:                 break;
232:             }
233:         }
234:         if !query_match { continue; }
235: 
236:         if let Some(re) = &route.matcher_status_code_regex {
237:             let status_val = get_field(api, task_ctx, "response.status");
238:             if !re.is_match(&status_val) { continue; }
239:         }
240: 
241:         // Match found — capture group, route target field, then jump to the module stage.
242:         if let Some(cap) = path_match_capture {
243:             let mut existing_capture = get_field(api, task_ctx, "request.capture");
244:             // An empty capture means the path ended at the prefix (e.g., "/prefix/").
245:             // Use "/" so downstream modules (e.g., stream) serve the root document.
246:             let effective_cap = if cap.is_empty() { "/" } else { &cap };
247:             existing_capture.push_str(effective_cap);
248:             set_field(api, task_ctx, "request.capture", &existing_capture);
249:         }
250: 
251:         set_field(api, task_ctx, "route.target", &route.module_id);
252: 
253:         let msg = CString::new(format!("Router matched route -> target: {}", route.module_id)).unwrap();
254:         (api.log)(task_ctx, OX_LOG_DEBUG, msg.as_ptr());
255: 
256:         // SKIP to the module plugin within the same pipeline stage.
257:         // The payload pointer is valid for the lifetime of CompiledRoute (server lifetime).
258:         return FlowControl { code: FLOW_CONTROL_SKIP, payload: route.module_id_cstring.as_ptr() };
259:     }
260: 
261:     // No route matched — end the stage without running any module plugin.
262:     // SKIP with null payload signals StageRunner to stop processing this stage.
263:     FlowControl { code: FLOW_CONTROL_SKIP, payload: std::ptr::null() }
264: }
265: 
266: #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
267: pub unsafe extern "C" fn ox_plugin_error(
268:     _plugin_config_ctx: *mut c_void,
269:     _task_ctx: *mut c_void,
270: ) {
271: }
272: 
273: #[unsafe(no_mangle)]
274: pub unsafe extern "C" fn ox_plugin_destroy(plugin_config_ctx: *mut c_void) {
275:     if !plugin_config_ctx.is_null() {
276:         let _ = unsafe { Box::from_raw(plugin_config_ctx as *mut ModuleContext) };
277:     }
278: }
